zh.Arundel, Sussex, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭素可阿盧德爾
zh.North Ferriby, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾諾斯 費利比
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Gerard Usflete III於大約1365年出生在英國素可時，他的父親Gerard Usflete Sheriff of Yorkshire31歲，母親Mary Furnival31歲。他於1387年與Elizabeth FitzAlan在英國英格蘭素可阿盧德爾結婚。他去世於1406年4月5日享年42歲，埋葬在英國越可爾諾斯 費利比。

zh-hans.Arundel, Sussex, England, United Kingdom: 英国英格兰素可阿盧德爾
zh-hans.North Ferriby, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾諾斯 費利比
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Gerard Usflete III于大约1365年出生在英国素可时，他的父亲Gerard Usflete Sheriff of Yorkshire31岁，母亲Mary Furnival31岁。他于1387年与Elizabeth FitzAlan在英国英格兰素可阿盧德爾结婚。他去世于1406年4月5日享年42岁，埋葬在英国越可爾諾斯 費利比。

nameMeanings.name: Gerard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + hard ‘brave, hardy, strong’. In the later Middle Ages this was a more common name than Gerald , with which it was sometimes confused. Nowadays it is less common, surviving mainly among Roman Catholics, in honour of the many saints of this name.

variants.name: Gerrard
meanings: Variant spelling of   Gerard  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Jerrard
meanings: Rare variant spelling of   Gerard  , probably influenced by the form of the modern surname, if not a transferred use.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Gerard Usflete III was born about 1365, in Sussex, England, his father, Gerard Usflete Sheriff of Yorkshire, was 31 and his mother, Mary Furnival, was 31. He married Elizabeth FitzAlan in 1387, in Arundel, Sussex, England, United Kingdom. He died on 5 April 1406, at the age of 42, and was buried in North Ferriby, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Gerard Usflete III est né environ 1365, à Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Gerard Usflete Sheriff of Yorkshire, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Mary Furnival, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth FitzAlan en 1387, à Arundel, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 5 avril 1406, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterré à North Ferriby, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Gerard Usflete III um 1365 in Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gerard Usflete Sheriff of Yorkshire 31 und seine Mutter Mary Furnival 31. Er hat 1387 in Arundel, Sussex, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth FitzAlan geheiratet. Er starb am 5. April 1406 im Alter von 42 Jahren und wurde in North Ferriby, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gerard Usflete III è nato il circa 1365 nel Sussex, England, il suo padre, Gerard Usflete Sheriff of Yorkshire, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Mary Furnival, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth FitzAlan nel 1387, nel Arundel, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 5 aprile 1406, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolto a North Ferriby, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Gerard Usflete IIIが約1365年にイギリススセックスで生まれた時，父Gerard Usflete Sheriff of Yorkshireは31歳，母Mary Furnivalは31歳であった。1387年にイギリスイギリススセックスアルンデルでElizabeth FitzAlanと結婚した。彼は1406年4月5日に42歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアノース フエリビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Gerard Usflete III(이)가 대략 1365년 영국 수세스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gerard Usflete Sheriff of Yorkshire(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Furnival(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1387년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 아런들에서 Elizabeth FitzAlan(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1406년 4월 5일 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 노르스 페리비에 묻혔다.

mn.Arundel, Sussex, England, United Kingdom: Arundel, Sūþsēaxe, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gerard Usflete III nasceu aproximadamente 1365, em Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Gerard Usflete Sheriff of Yorkshire, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Mary Furnival, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth FitzAlan em 1387, em Arundel, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 5 de abril de 1406, com 42 anos, e foi sepultado em North Ferriby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Gerard Usflete III родился около 1365 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Gerard Usflete Sheriff of Yorkshire было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Mary Furnival, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth FitzAlan в 1387 г. в местности арундель, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 5 апреля 1406 г. в возрасте 42 лет и был похоронен в местности норт фирриби, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Gerard Usflete III nació aproximadamente 1365, en Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Gerard Usflete Sheriff of Yorkshire, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Mary Furnival, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Elizabeth FitzAlan en 1387, en Arundel, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 5 de abril de 1406, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultado en North Ferriby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
